scripts.db:info: pnpm dlx wrangler@latest d1 info invoice-db --json
scripts.db:migrate:local: pnpm dlx wrangler@latest d1 migrations apply invoice-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: pnpm dlx wrangler@latest d1 migrations apply invoice-db --remote
scripts.deploy: pnpm build && pnpm dlx wrangler@latest deploy
